headlines.title: Global Markets | Japan's Nikkei ends near three-week low as AI-stock selloff weighs
Japan's Nikkei ends near three-week low as AI-stock selloff weighs
Japan stocks lower at close of trade; Nikkei 225 down 1.34%
Japanese Stocks Are Bargains, Even After Big Gains
Japan's Nikkei ends near three-week low as AI-stock selloff weighs
Japan Stocks Take A Breather As AI Trade Loses Steam
Asian shares track Wall Street's retreat as bond markets crank up the pressure

marketTone.ko: 오늘 일본 증시는 하락세를 보이며 닛케이 225 지수가 1.34% 내린 3주래 최저치에 근접했습니다. 이러한 하락은 인공지능(AI) 관련 주식의 매도세와 AI 테마의 동력 상실에 주로 기인합니다. 또한, 채권 시장의 압력으로 인한 월스트리트의 후퇴를 아시아 증시가 추종하면서 전반적인 시장 심리가 위축되었습니다.
marketTone.en: The Japanese stock market experienced a downturn today, with the Nikkei 225 closing near a three-week low, down 1.34%. This decline was largely attributed to a selloff in AI-related stocks as the AI trade lost steam. Shares also tracked a broader retreat on Wall Street, influenced by increasing pressure from bond markets, reflecting a cautious global sentiment.
